name: Brutalist Portfolio Redesign
objective: Redesign foldcraft portfolio with tactical telemetry/industrial brutalist aesthetic: #0A0A0A bg, #EAEAEA fg, #E61919 red accent, zero radius, solid borders, CRT scanline overlay
exit_criteria: All color tokens updated to brutalist palette (bg:#0A0A0A, fg:#EAEAEA, accent:#E61919)
All border-radius values set to 0 — no rounded corners anywhere
All shadow and glow effects removed
CRT scanline overlay visible on background
JetBrains Mono font imported and used for telemetry/UI labels
ASCII bracket section headers `[ TITLE ]` replace section-eyebrow
Nav uses `[ KRISH ]` branding with mono uppercase links
Button.jsx: flat rectangles, uppercase mono labels, red primary accent
Card.jsx: solid bg, 1px border, zero radius, no double-bezel
Particle colors changed from cyan to white + red accent
LenisProvider and Three.js particle system remain functional
No data arrays (PROJECTS, WRITEUPS, JOURNEY, STACK, SOCIALS) modified
